title: nephrodium fraternum
intro: Nephrodium fraternum, also known as the False Lady Fern or Lady Fern, is a plant species belonging to the fern family, native to the subtropical regions of the Americas. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of kidney and urinary tract issues. The health benefits of Nephrodium fraternum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Nephrodium fraternum can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
